title: ANC - 2b-Change ANC to Off during call when Transparency is ON before call
scenario: Verify that turning ANC OFF during a call (after Transparency was ON before the call) correctly restores Transparency mode with its previous value after the call ends.
steps: Preconditions: ANC mode is OFF and set to Adaptive or Standard; Transparency mode is ON and set to Environment or Speech.
Start/join a call (Zoom, Teams, Mobile) — ANC turns ON with previously selected option, Transparency becomes greyed out and turned OFF.
Tap Transparency toggle — popup informs user option is unavailable during call.
Tap ANC toggle to turn it OFF — ANC is set to OFF with no selected value.

Leave the call — On Emu/Osprey/Tern: ANC stays OFF, Transparency becomes accessible again and set to OFF with previously selected value. On Lark/Peregrine: ANC stays OFF, Transparency becomes accessible again and set to ON with previously selected value.
Tap ANC and Transparency toggles — user can switch between ANC and Transparency modes.
expected: After leaving the call, ANC stays OFF. Transparency becomes accessible again. On Emu/Osprey/Tern: Transparency is set to OFF with previously selected value. On Lark/Peregrine: Transparency is set to ON with previously selected value. User can then switch between ANC and Transparency modes by tapping the toggles.
